meaning: adj.乐土的,象天堂的,幸福的
examples: Those fairy forms of bliss Elysian.
This was the exact feeling that Elysian Hotel Chicago gave me.
The summer, in some climates, makes possible to man a sort of Elysian life.
White bluely bathed in Elysian fields they run, And I don't care what time it is.
Russia has not corralled its former colonies back into line with Elysian visions of a dreamy future.
